hypothesis.statement: CIFAR-100 should benefit more from a modern recipe than from a plain baseline: WRN-28-10 plus RandAugment, Mixup, and late-phase SAM should improve the accuracy-to-time tradeoff over always-on SAM and smoke-level ResNet training.
hypothesis.expected_information_gain: Separates representation capacity from optimization sharpness by delaying SAM until late training, revealing whether flat-minima selection is the main gain driver under this harness budget.
